case_title: LATISHA TAYLOR VS. VALENCIA GARDENS HOUSING, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $490.00 FILED BY TAYLOR, LATISHA AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA GARDENS HOUSING, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JOHN STEWART CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANTS WERE REPRESENTED BY VINCENT ALVERENGA--LP PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART CO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JOHN STEWART CO. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-17-2012 AT 10:00 AM.
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT VALENCIA GARDENS HOUSING, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JOHN STEWART CO.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, LATISHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALENCIA GARDENS HOUSING, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
